case_title: DOMESTIC CHEESE COMPANY, INC VS. ALANTA TRADING AND SALES COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER --PER COMM. HEWLETT--ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS AGAINST DEFTS AND ORDER FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $623.00, FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS AGAINST DEFTS, AND ORDER FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOMESTIC CHEESE COMPANY, INC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-25-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CORRESPONDENCE, ARBITRATOR, RICHARD H. WISE TO COUNSELS; ARBITRATION HEARING DATE: JANUARY 10, 2003 @ 10:00 AM
DISCOVERY 612, NOTICE OF MOTION FOR ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSION AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS; GRANTED IN ITS ENTIRETY

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOMESTIC CHEESE COMPANY, INC AS TO DEFENDANT ALANTA TRADING AND SALES COMPANY DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-09-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-06-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-12-2002
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR OCT-07-2002. AUG-09-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE OCT-17-2002.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ALANTA TRADING AND SALES COMPANY LEROY, ROBERT SANCHEZ, ROBERT
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-24-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NOTICE OF MOTION FOR ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSION AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS;, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOMESTIC CHEESE COMPANY, INC HEARING SET FOR DEC-04-2002 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 612
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON APR-25-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. FEB-24-2003 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOMESTIC CHEESE COMPANY, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALANTA TRADING AND SALES COMPANY LEROY, ROBERT SANCHEZ, ROBERT $36,049.75 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $36,049.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ARBITRATOR RICHARD HUNGERFORD WISE APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-22-2002 THROUGH JAN-20-2003.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT, SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR - RICHARD H. WISE
